historical_note: This report was produced from the previous 350-row / 315-train / 35-eval artifacts. Preserve its metrics as historical only; do not compare directly to the current canonical 317-row artifacts.
status_note: Full 35-example Phase 2 baseline completed with status=pass. See metrics/baseline_qwen2.5-7b.json for schema_validity=1.0, f1_global=0.0971, field_recall.exact=0.054, and per-path categorical_accuracy. The full baseline was run with VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER=0. Phase 3 (SFT/QLoRA) was NOT started — it is gated on this baseline existing.
runner_hardening_note: scripts/baseline_qwen_full.py was hardened (no model re-run, artifacts above preserved) so that a --limit-limited invocation can no longer write status='pass' to this file or claim full baseline completion. Limited runs now report a 'partial_*' status and skip the readiness write by default; --update-readiness is an explicit opt-in that only writes a 'partial_baseline_runs' record and never touches status/status_note/full_baseline. The top-level status='pass' above reflects the pre-hardening full 35/35 run and is the authoritative Phase-2-unblocks-Phase-3 signal.

previous_phase_2_blocker_details._note: Historical context only — these were the blockers recorded before vLLM was installed. They are kept here for traceability of how the smoke environment was set up; they are no longer active.
previous_phase_2_blocker_details.previous_blocker_reason: vLLM was not installed in the project virtual environment; the planned Phase 2 approach requires vLLM with structured outputs (MVS schema) over the eval set. Without vLLM we would have been inventing a different baseline, which is explicitly disallowed by the orchestrator contract.
previous_missing_artifacts: Local copy of Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct (~14 GB) for offline serving; not yet downloaded.
previous_risks_for_sm_120: vLLM Blackwell consumer (sm_120 / RTX 5090) support has been added in recent versions; the chosen vLLM release must explicitly include sm_120 kernels.
vLLM install pulls its own torch/CUDA stack and may collide with the current torch 2.12.1+cu130 build (resolved in practice: torch downgraded to 2.11.0+cu130 alongside vllm 0.23.0).

guided_json (legacy) / structured_outputs (current API) must support the MVS features used in the schema (Draft 2020-12 with $ref, arrays with minItems, additionalProperties:false). A smoke test with one eval example must succeed before running all 35.
previous_what_was_not_done: Did not pip-install vllm (would take ~5-10 min plus several GB and may break the current torch stack).
Did not download Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct weights (not required by Phase 1 gate; Phase 2 will need them).
Did not run any baseline inference.

remaining_work: Phase 3 (SFT/QLoRA on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) is now unblocked from a data-eval perspective; should be started only after a human reviews the qualitative report and confirms the baseline numbers as a credible reference point.
next_commands_for_orchestrator: Full Phase 2 baseline is already DONE — do NOT re-run scripts/baseline_qwen_full.py. Current artifacts: metrics/baseline_qwen2.5-7b.json (machine-readable metrics + per_example records), metrics/baseline_qwen2.5-7b_outputs.jsonl (raw per-example outputs with elapsed_seconds populated), metrics/qualitative_report.md (qualitative observations), reports/phase2_readiness.json (this file).

HUMAN REVIEW GATE: review metrics/qualitative_report.md and metrics/baseline_qwen2.5-7b.json to confirm the weak baseline (schema_validity=1.0 but f1_global=0.0971, tiene_eventos_protesta accuracy=0.2857, field_recall.exact=0.054, mean_per_example=5.03s over 35/35 examples) is a credible reference point for Phase 3.

If APPROVED: proceed to Phase 3 (SFT/QLoRA on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) per PLAN_ENTRENAMIENTO_QWEN.md §Fase 3. If NOT approved: iterate on Phase 2 first (e.g., expand the eval split, try a different baseline model, or revisit the MVS schema/codebook) before touching Phase 3.
files_created_or_modified_by_this_run: metrics/baseline_qwen2.5-7b_outputs.jsonl (new — raw per-example generations + parse/schema results)
metrics/qualitative_report.md (new — qualitative report on failure patterns)
